events.payload:
**Arc**: AI has just completed a full investigation of Claude Cowork's data format and storage paths, concluding that the plugin cannot yet discover Cowork sessions. AI has identified exactly what would be needed to add support and enumerated three concrete prerequisites.

**Before**: AI proposes two named alternative paths before implementing: (1) write a spec or open a feature issue in `.scratch/`; (2) run a minimal validation script to dump all Cowork sessions from the local machine and confirm that `userSelectedFolders` is reliable across multiple sessions before deciding on the implementation approach.

**Event (AI proposal вҖ” verbatim)**: "иҰҒдёҚиҰҒжҲ‘жҠҠиҝҷеқ—еҶҷжҲҗдёҖдёӘ spec / еңЁ `.scratch/` ејҖдёӘ feature issue?жҲ–иҖ…е…ҲеҒҡдёҖдёӘжңҖе°ҸйӘҢиҜҒ:еҶҷдёӘи„ҡжң¬жҠҠдҪ иҝҷеҸ°жңәеҷЁдёҠзҡ„ Cowork дјҡиҜқе…Ё dump еҮәжқҘ,зЎ®и®Ө `userSelectedFolders` еңЁеӨҡдјҡиҜқдёӢйғҪйқ еҫ—дҪҸ,еҶҚеҶіе®ҡж”№йҖ ж–№жЎҲгҖӮ"

**Event (user response вҖ” verbatim)**: "иғҪеҠ иҝӣеҺ»еҗ—пјҹ"

**Event classification**: negative-space

**After вҖ” concrete artifacts**: AI directly edited `work-memory-claude-plugin/agents/work-log-synthesizer.md` (11 edits, T49-T70), `README.md` (T75, T77), and `CHANGELOG.md` (T79). `git diff --stat` at T84 confirmed: 3 files changed, 56 insertions(+), 10 deletions(-).

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: (a) AI's proposal was specific: two named paths вҖ” a `.scratch/` spec/issue, or a validation dump script to verify `userSelectedFolders` reliability before committing to the approach. (b) User did not take either up: "иғҪеҠ иҝӣеҺ»еҗ—" directed straight to implementation without addressing either alternative. (c) Subsequent work followed a different axis: the next 25 turns were direct prompt-engineering edits to `work-log-synthesizer.md` and docs, with no spec written and no validation script run.

**Arc**: AI has just completed end-to-end verification that the Cowork synthesizer changes work: `synthesized 1 entries` with `agent_backend: cowork` confirmed at T122-T126. AI summarises the result and presents next steps.

**Before**: AI presents three specific named options: (1) run `/work-memory:work-report` to see the synthesized entry projected as a daily report; (2) decide whether to keep or delete the test project `mock-user/mock-org/agent-production`; (3) commit the changes (AI notes it would open a branch first).

**Event (AI proposal вҖ” verbatim)**: "жҺҘдёӢжқҘжғіжҖҺж ·,дҪ йҖү:\n- и·‘ `/work-memory:work-report` зңӢиҝҷжқЎ entry жҠ•еҪұжҲҗзҡ„ж—ҘжҠҘй•ҝе•Ҙж ·;\n- иҝҷдёӘжөӢиҜ•йЎ№зӣ®иҰҒдҝқз•ҷ(е®ғжҚ•иҺ·зҡ„жҳҜдҪ зңҹе®һзҡ„ Cowork жҖқиҖғ)иҝҳжҳҜжҲ‘её®дҪ жё…жҺү;\n- ж”№еҠЁж»Ўж„Ҹзҡ„иҜқ,жҲ‘еҸҜд»ҘжҸҗдәӨ(дјҡе…ҲејҖдёӘеҲҶж”Ҝ)гҖӮ"

**Event (user response вҖ” verbatim)**: "ok дҪ жң¬ең°еҗҜеҠЁ жҲ‘жүҫдёӘ cowork зҡ„зӣ®еҪ•иҜ•иҜ•ж•Ҳжһң"

**Event classification**: negative-space

**After вҖ” concrete artifacts**: AI checked node/plugin state (T87-T90), ran `npm run build` (T91-T92), smoke-tested the work-memory CLI binary (T93-T94), enumerated Cowork session directories (T96-T97), checked plugin installation state (T98-T101), then launched a headless `claude -p "/work-memory:work-log"` run against the AgentProduction directory (T114). None of the three proposed options вҖ” report generation, project cleanup, or branch-and-commit вҖ” were executed.

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: (a) AI's proposal was specific: a list of three named actions вҖ” generate a report, keep or delete the test project, commit on a new branch. (b) User did not take any of them up: the response redirected to launching a client for manual testing without addressing any of the three. (c) Subsequent work followed a different axis: the next 10 turns rebuilt the CLI, relisted Cowork dirs, and launched a headless synthesizer run вҖ” none of the three offered paths.
